briefs.suggestedTitle: Old vs New Tax Regime: Which Is Better for Your Situation?
briefs.suggestedH1: Old vs New Tax Regime: Which Is Better?
briefs.quickAnswer: The better regime depends on income, deductions, exemptions, and salary structure. The old regime may help when eligible deductions are higher, while the new regime may be simpler when deductions are lower.

briefs.suggestedTitle: New Tax Regime vs Old Regime for Salaried Employees
briefs.suggestedH1: New Tax Regime vs Old Regime for Salaried Employees
briefs.quickAnswer: For salaried employees, the answer depends on salary structure, HRA, deductions, exemptions, and filing context. The new regime may be simpler when deductions are lower, while the old regime may help when eligible deductions are meaningfully higher.
